scope: Store suggestion engine equipment use evaluation
changes: Added equipment-use-evaluator.js to score equipment by usability, training fit, expected DC success, benefit, and credit efficiency.
Gear suggestions now include equipmentUseFit as a scoring component and as structured metadata.
Gear suggestion explanations now distinguish can-use from full-use.
Store now builds a shared StoreSuggestionContext and passes it to armor, weapon, and gear suggestion engines.
Store gear suggestions now map by gearId, fixing equipment suggestions that were scored but not attached to item cards.
Store item views expose useEvaluation metadata for future UI rendering.
rulesPrinciples: Untrained does not automatically mean unusable.
Trained-only extra skill uses reduce full-use fit until the actor is trained or the equipment grants an override.
Expected benefit is based on actor skill total plus equipment bonus against known or benchmark DCs.
Credit efficiency is scored separately from raw utility so expensive items must justify their cost.
